name: lifeos
description: LifeOS - AI 驱动的个人未来预测引擎

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && /opt/homebrew/bin/python3.12 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install flask flask-cors openai 'zep-cloud==3.13.0' python-dotenv pydantic PyMuPDF charset-normalizer chardet
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
